name: Redeem Transportation
service_types: NEMT/special-needs ground transport (not yellow-bus school operator)
recent_news: No M&A or news found; appears to be a very small Colorado Springs ground-transport / NEMT operator. Source data flags special_needs=1 and school=0.
fit_notes: Not a fit for Summit tuck-in. ~4 employees, ~$331K revenue, no evidence of yellow-bus school district contracts; appears to be NEMT/limo-type micro-operator.

name: National Limousine Svc
recent_news: No M&A or operating-news found. Not a school-bus contractor. Ypsilanti-area micro-operator; likely livery/limo and possible NEMT special-needs rides.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Limousine/car-service micro-operator (~5 employees, ~$328K rev); no yellow-bus or school-district presence indicated.

name: Montco Union Taxi
recent_news: Operates as worker-owned cooperative at 702 E Gude Dr, Rockville (Anytime Union Taxi Cooperative); 100% wheelchair-accessible fleet. MCPS runs its own school transportation in-house, so no school-bus contract identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Worker-owned taxi cooperative (not a yellow-bus contractor); cooperative ownership structure also makes a PE tuck-in structurally awkward.

name: Tealwood Transportation
service_types: special-needs ground transport (not yellow-bus); possible NEMT/SPED van service
districts_or_customers: Possibly Grand Meadow ISD 495 / Mower County area
recent_news: No web presence or news located. Note that a separately-named operator, Valley Transportation Service Inc, also operates in Grand Meadow, MN.
fit_notes: Not a fit. ~6 employees, ~$325K revenue; no evidence of school-district yellow-bus contracts. Likely a special-needs van micro-operator.

name: Ride On Time Town Car Svc
service_types: town car / livery (possible NEMT special-needs rides)
recent_news: No news, website, or M&A activity identified. PO Box-only Denver micro-operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Town-car/livery micro-operator (~4 employees, ~$323K rev); no school-bus or district contract presence.
